summary.para: An object containing the input data for the model to embed.
The format of the input. For the text type this must be text. For the image type, this must be base64. If not specified, this will default to text for the text type and base64 for the image type.
The type of input to embed.
The value of the input to embed. For images, this must be a base64-encoded data URI, i.e. "data:content/type;base64,..."
